creator_specialty: Accessible tech education for beginner and intermediate audiences
focus_area: Breaking down complex developer tools, AI workflows, and productivity stacks into friendly, 15–20 minute tutorials.
audience_demographics: Primary: 22–35, early-career professionals and advanced students
Global audience with 40% North America, 30% India/SE Asia, 20% Europe, 10% other
Over-indexes on software engineers, designers, and creators building a technical skill stack

expertise_areas.description: Deep-dive product walkthroughs that blend live screen-share, hand-drawn diagrams, and real-world project examples.
Structured multi-part series that take viewers from ‘I’ve never opened this tool’ to ‘I can ship something tangible’.
Helps SaaS brands translate onboarding, setup flows, and advanced features into intuitive learning paths.

proposed_deliverables.name: From Zero to First Production Workflow
proposed_deliverables.brand_objective: Increase activation and expansion for a developer-focused SaaS product via a 4-part educational series tied to in-product milestones.

previous_collaborations: FlowBoard — async collaboration suite launch with ‘week in the life’ tutorials
DataNest — intro to modern data stacks for analysts and ops teams
StackCraft — sponsored live streams on building side projects end-to-end
bio: Marcus is a former developer advocate who now teaches technology full time. His audience trusts him to cut through marketing jargon, explain trade-offs honestly, and show how tools fit into real-world workflows. Brands partner with Marcus when they need depth, clarity, and long-term education—not just a one-off shoutout.
